_README: Delivery fees in AED. All fees updated to AED 25 flat rate per Beyond Style Delivery Policy effective 2026-05-31 (Halan / approved courier). Previous area-specific fees (JVC AED 15, Al Taawun AED 20) are superseded. Do NOT use AED 30 for new orders.
_policy_update: 2026-05-31: Standard UAE delivery fee set to AED 25 flat across all emirates. Source: Delivery Policy sheet, 01/06/2026 update.

_status_legend.confirmed: Verified against real Beyond Style delivery policy. Safe to use.
_status_legend.placeholder: Estimate only. Edit before production use.
